title: Login page not loading
description: Users are unable to access the login page from the homepage.

title: Payment gateway error
description: Transactions are failing during checkout process.

title: UI alignment issue on dashboard
description: Widgets are overlapping on smaller screen devices.

title: Email notifications not sending
description: System is not sending confirmation emails to new users.

title: Password reset link expired
description: Reset link expires immediately after generation.

title: Slow page loading speed
description: Product listing page takes more than 10 seconds to load.

title: Profile picture upload failed
description: Users cannot upload profile images larger than 2MB.

title: API returning 500 error
description: Internal server error when fetching order history.

title: Search functionality not working
description: Search results do not display relevant items.

title: Database connection timeout
description: Application loses connection to database intermittently.

title: Mobile menu not responsive
description: Hamburger menu does not open on Android devices.

title: Incorrect invoice calculation
description: Tax calculation is incorrect for international orders.
